cover: System architecture diagram: 'Salesforce Headless 360: API + MCP + CLI'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Salesforce Headless 360'. Subtitle '4000+ APIs, 220+ CLI commands, 60+ MCP tools — no browser required'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Developer Surface' pastel blue: modules 'sf CLI', 'Metadata API', 'GraphQL API v64.0'. LAYER 2 'Agent Surface' pastel purple: modules '@salesforce/mcp', 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2'. LAYER 3 'Data Surface' pastel green: modules 'Data 360', 'Retriever API', 'Zero Copy federation'. Central node 'Headless 360 Control Plane' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP' and 'Heroku MCP hosting'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Enterprise Automation Path': sub-modules 'CI/CD Pipeline', 'Service Console Extension', 'AI Ops Agent' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Stop Clicking Salesforce: Use Headless 360'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Stop Clicking Salesforce: Use Headless 360'. Subtitle 'Replace brittle browser automation with API, MCP, and CLI contracts'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Browser scripts break with Setup UI changes with broken cursor icon', 'API contracts survive releases with shield icon', 'MCP tools give agents safe actions with robot tool icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: UI Automation' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Headless Automation' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'await page.click(\"text=Setup\"); await page.fill(\"input[name=q]\", \"Profiles\"); await page.click(\"text=System Administrator\");', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'await client.callTool({ name: soqlTool.name, arguments: { query: \"SELECT Id, Name FROM Profile WITH USER_MODE LIMIT 10\" } });'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Version tool calls', 'Log every mutation', 'Run in CI'. Footer bar: 'Headless 360 = API + MCP + CLI as the default platform interface'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Secure Headless Salesforce Access'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Secure Headless Salesforce Access'. Subtitle 'Every API, MCP tool, and CLI command is a security boundary'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'User context with person shield icon', 'Least privilege with key icon', 'Auditable tool calls with log icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: System-Mode Shortcut' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Explicit User Mode' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'public without sharing class CaseApi { Case c = [SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE Id = :caseId]; update c; }', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'public with sharing class CaseApi { Case c = [SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE Id = :caseId WITH USER_MODE]; Database.update(c, AccessLevel.USER_MODE); }'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Scoped connected apps', 'Permission set groups', 'Tool-call audit logs'. Footer bar: 'Headless access without security boundaries is just faster data leakage'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
